name: cc-harness
description: cc-harness — a layered harness for Claude Code: cc-tools (philosophy-agnostic helpers: crux, slap, cc-init, rules) + cc-funnel (the ground -> diverge -> decide -> build product funnel) -> cc-agent (the musician, one self-driving agent) -> cc-maestro (the ccmaestro console that watches and controls many agents at once).

plugins.name: cc-tools
plugins.description: The tools layer: philosophy-agnostic helpers usable in any project — /crux unwinds a pain or doubt into one diagnosis, /slap resets a stuck fix, /cc-init onboards a project onto the harness, plus a set of recommended project rules. Zero-config.

plugins.name: cc-funnel
plugins.description: The product funnel: /roadmap-management grounds the North Star and charts a roadmap, /what-to-do ranks where to go next, /how-to-do decides one fork, /do builds one task to a smoke-checked finish, /refactor-review-test hardens it and commits — a ground -> diverge -> decide -> build pipeline. Depends on cc-tools.

plugins.name: cc-agent
plugins.description: The self-driving agent layer: the musician (/musician) drives one piece of work through the cc-tools funnel to its own falsifiable definition of done, then closes itself — bounded and self-closing, not a never-stop loop. By default it shapes the idea with you first, then builds alone (--auto for full autonomy from the start). With a prompt it thinks the task through first (and may decline a bad idea); without one it finds a direction itself. /musician-cancel is the manual brake. Depends on cc-tools.

plugins.name: cc-maestro
plugins.description: The conductor layer: the ccmaestro console observes and controls many coding agents and musicians at once (tokens, stalls, loops, stop/steer).
